# UC-22.53.18 · AWIA EPA Sanitary-Survey Cyber Readiness — evidence basic cyber hygiene (segmentation, MFA, patching, backup, IR) demonstrable during PWS sanitary survey

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Security &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*In some states, when a health inspector audits a water plant, they now also check the cyber basics: are computers separated, do you use two-step login, do you patch, do you back up, do you train staff. We watch all six items and ring the bell if any are missing before the inspection.*

---

## Description

Tracks sanitary-survey cyber-readiness for utilities in states that have adopted the EPA Cybersecurity Action Plan.

## Value

Where states have adopted, the sanitary survey is now a regular cyber audit. This UC catches the gap before the surveyor knocks on the door.

## Implementation

(1) Maintain `awia_sanitary_survey_state_adoption_lookup` and the calendar / hygiene-evidence lookups. (2) Weekly UC-22.53.18. (3) Archive.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.53.18` archived weekly to `audit_evidence` with `awia_clause="AWIA-EPA-sanitary-survey"`. Every row pins (pwsid, state, primacy_agency, cyber_in_survey_scope, last_survey_at, last_survey_finding_count, segmentation_evidence_url, mfa_evidence_url, patching_evidence_url, backup_evidence_url, ir_evidence_url, training_evidence_url, sanitary_survey_status).

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Sanitary survey scheduled in 60 days; `mfa_evidence_url` missing. UC-22.53.18 MUST surface with `sanitary_survey_status="approaching_survey_with_gaps"`.

### Negative scenario

All six evidence URLs current; sanitary survey scheduled. UC-22.53.18 MUST record `sanitary_survey_status="ready"`.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UCs for MFA (UC-22.53.21), segmentation (UC-22.53.22), and patching (UC-22.53.27) deployed so the evidence URLs are populated.
- Splunk ES.
- Indexes `index=compliance`, `index=audit_evidence`.
- Lookups `awia_sanitary_survey_state_adoption_lookup`, `awia_sanitary_survey_calendar_lookup`, `awia_hygiene_evidence_lookup`.

## Step 1 — Configure data collection

State-adoption lookup tracks each state's adoption status (refreshed by Compliance Officer at EPA / state primacy publication). Hygiene-evidence URLs are populated by the underlying UCs.

## Step 2 — Create the search and alert

Weekly Wednesday 09:00.

```ini
[UC-22.53.18: AWIA Sanitary Survey Readiness]
cron_schedule = 0 9 * * 3
dispatch.earliest_time = -7d@d
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.53.18,reg=AWIA,clause=AWIA-EPA-sanitary-survey
action.notable.param.severity = medium
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 3 — Validate deployment

Positive: 60 days to survey, missing MFA URL; UC fires.  Negative: all URLs present; UC clears.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

Dashboard `AWIA — Sanitary Survey Readiness`. Runbook: close evidence gaps 60+ days before survey.

## Step 5 — Troubleshooting

**AWIA-specific failure modes**:

- **State-survey methodology variance**: surveyor materials differ by state; align local checklist.
- **Joint EPA / state surveys**: federal involvement may follow a state finding; align to UC-22.53.5 certification cycle.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup awia_pws_registry_lookup
| where population_served > 3300
| lookup awia_sanitary_survey_state_adoption_lookup state OUTPUT cyber_in_survey_scope
| where cyber_in_survey_scope="true"
| lookup awia_sanitary_survey_calendar_lookup pwsid OUTPUT next_survey_at
| lookup awia_hygiene_evidence_lookup pwsid OUTPUT segmentation_evidence_url mfa_evidence_url patching_evidence_url backup_evidence_url ir_evidence_url training_evidence_url
| eval days_to_survey = if(isnotnull(next_survey_at), round((next_survey_at - now()) / 86400, 0), null())
| eval missing_evidence = mvfilter(NOT match(mvappend(segmentation_evidence_url, mfa_evidence_url, patching_evidence_url, backup_evidence_url, ir_evidence_url, training_evidence_url), ".+"))
| eval missing_evidence_count = mvcount(missing_evidence)
| eval sanitary_survey_status = case(
    missing_evidence_count >= 3, "survey_not_ready",
    missing_evidence_count > 0 AND days_to_survey <= 90, "approaching_survey_with_gaps",
    missing_evidence_count > 0, "evidence_gap",
    1=1, "ready")
| table pwsid system_name state primacy_agency cyber_in_survey_scope next_survey_at days_to_survey segmentation_evidence_url mfa_evidence_url patching_evidence_url backup_evidence_url ir_evidence_url training_evidence_url missing_evidence_count sanitary_survey_status
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Readiness RAG by PWSID. (Panel 2) Time-to-survey vs evidence-count.

## Known False Positives

1. **State not adopting** — cyber_in_survey_scope=false; filtered.

**Suppression**: `awia_22_53_18_exceptions`; 30-day max.

## References

- [EPA July 2024 Cybersecurity Action Plan](https://www.epa.gov/waterresilience/forms/water-sector-cybersecurity)
- [EPA — Sanitary Surveys](https://www.epa.gov/dwreginfo/sanitary-surveys)
